auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Habitica API Token sent with the x-api-key header for authenticated API v3 requests. Find or reset it in Settings > API after signing in, then follow the official API docs: https://habitica.com/apidoc/

extraFields.label: User ID
extraFields.description: Habitica User ID sent with the x-api-user header. Copy it from Settings > API in your Habitica account, alongside the API Token: https://habitica.com/apidoc/

extraFields.label: X-Client Header
extraFields.description: The exact X-Client header value required by Habitica for third-party tools. Follow the official API usage guideline format <creator Habitica UserID>-<appname>: https://github.com/HabitRPG/habitica/wiki/API-Usage-Guidelines

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating one Habitica tag.

anyOf.description: The Habitica challenge identifier when this tag belongs to a challenge.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating one Habitica tag.

actions.name: create_task
actions.description: Create one new personal Habitica task from a single JSON task object.

text.description: The text displayed for the Habitica task.

tags.description: The Habitica tag IDs to attach to the task.

alias.description: An optional Habitica alias for the task.

attribute.description: The Habitica stat associated with the task.

completed.description: Whether the checklist item starts completed.

items.description: One checklist item to send to Habitica.

checklist.description: The checklist items to attach to the task.

collapseChecklist.description: Whether Habitica should collapse the checklist.

date.description: The due date to send to Habitica for todo tasks.

repeat.description: The Habitica repeat object for dailies, keyed by weekday abbreviations.

everyX.description: The Habitica everyX interval for dailies.

streak.description: The Habitica streak value for dailies.

daysOfMonth.description: The Habitica daysOfMonth values for monthly dailies.

weeksOfMonth.description: The Habitica weeksOfMonth values for monthly dailies.

startDate.description: The Habitica start date for dailies.

up.description: Whether a habit can be scored up.

down.description: Whether a habit can be scored down.

value.description: The Habitica reward cost or task value.

inputSchema.description: The common Habitica user task fields accepted by create and update endpoints.

anyOf.description: Whether the Habitica task is completed.
The Habitica stat associated with the task.
The Habitica due date string when returned.

tags.description: The Habitica tag IDs attached to the task.

anyOf.description: Whether the checklist item is completed.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating one Habitica task.

actions.name: delete_tag
actions.description: Delete one Habitica tag by tag ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Habitica tag.

deleted.description: Whether the Habitica tag deletion was accepted.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when deleting one Habitica tag.

actions.name: delete_task
actions.description: Delete one Habitica task by task ID or alias.

taskId.description: The Habitica task ID or alias.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Habitica task.

deleted.description: Whether the Habitica task deletion was accepted.

taskId.description: The Habitica task ID or alias.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when deleting one Habitica task.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Get one Habitica task by task ID or alias.

taskId.description: The Habitica task ID or alias.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading one Habitica task.

anyOf.description: Whether the Habitica task is completed.
The Habitica stat associated with the task.
The Habitica due date string when returned.

tags.description: The Habitica tag IDs attached to the task.

anyOf.description: Whether the checklist item is completed.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when reading one Habitica task.

actions.name: get_user_profile
actions.description: Get the authenticated Habitica user's profile with optional userFields filtering.

userFields.description: A comma-separated Habitica userFields selection passed through to the /user endpoint.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading the authenticated Habitica user profile.

anyOf.description: The Habitica party identifier when the user has one.

user.description: The normalized authenticated Habitica user profile.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when reading the authenticated Habitica user profile.

actions.name: list_my_tasks
actions.description: List the authenticated Habitica user's tasks with optional type and dueDate filters.

type.description: The task type filter supported by Habitica.

dueDate.description: The optional date used for Habitica nextDue computation.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing the authenticated Habitica user's tasks.

anyOf.description: Whether the Habitica task is completed.
The Habitica stat associated with the task.
The Habitica due date string when returned.

tags.description: The Habitica tag IDs attached to the task.

anyOf.description: Whether the checklist item is completed.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Habitica tasks.

actions.name: list_tags
actions.description: List the authenticated Habitica user's tags.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for listing Habitica tags.

anyOf.description: The Habitica challenge identifier when this tag belongs to a challenge.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Habitica tags.

actions.name: score_task
actions.description: Score one Habitica task in the up or down direction.

taskId.description: The Habitica task ID or alias.

direction.description: The direction used to score a Habitica task.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for scoring one Habitica task.

anyOf.description: The user's remaining stat points after scoring.

tmp.description: The temporary drop payload returned by Habitica.

raw.description: The raw Habitica score response data.

scoreResult.description: The normalized Habitica task score result.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when scoring one Habitica task.

actions.name: update_tag
actions.description: Update one Habitica tag by tag ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating one Habitica tag.

anyOf.description: The Habitica challenge identifier when this tag belongs to a challenge.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when updating one Habitica tag.

actions.description: Update one Habitica task by task ID or alias.

taskId.description: The Habitica task ID or alias.

text.description: The text displayed for the Habitica task.

tags.description: The Habitica tag IDs to attach to the task.

alias.description: An optional Habitica alias for the task.

attribute.description: The Habitica stat associated with the task.

completed.description: Whether the checklist item starts completed.

items.description: One checklist item to send to Habitica.

checklist.description: The checklist items to attach to the task.

collapseChecklist.description: Whether Habitica should collapse the checklist.

date.description: The due date to send to Habitica for todo tasks.

repeat.description: The Habitica repeat object for dailies, keyed by weekday abbreviations.

everyX.description: The Habitica everyX interval for dailies.

streak.description: The Habitica streak value for dailies.

daysOfMonth.description: The Habitica daysOfMonth values for monthly dailies.

weeksOfMonth.description: The Habitica weeksOfMonth values for monthly dailies.

startDate.description: The Habitica start date for dailies.

up.description: Whether a habit can be scored up.

down.description: Whether a habit can be scored down.

value.description: The Habitica reward cost or task value.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating one Habitica task.

anyOf.description: Whether the Habitica task is completed.
The Habitica stat associated with the task.
The Habitica due date string when returned.

tags.description: The Habitica tag IDs attached to the task.
